news.title: Central Bank says strong exports offset energy import surge
news.description: Türkiye’s foreign trade balance improved in the second quarter despite a sharp rise in energy imports, as exports remained strong and non-energy imports declined, according to an analysis published on July 6 on the Turkish Central Bank’s blog.

news.title: South Africa in history’s struggle
news.description: Kevin Cox’s NLR essay on South Africa claims to correct liberal and culturalist accounts through historical materialism. But it reproduces the very epistemic and analytical failures it sets out to overcome.

news.title: Gold slips ₹150, silver drops ₹5,000 as strong US dollar dents bullion demand
news.description: Traders said the market remained range-bound as investors balanced lingering geopolitical risks in West Asia against a stronger greenback and expectations surrounding the US Federal Reserve's monetary policy.

news.title: Gold drops 30%, silver plunges 54% — but history shows 2026 correction isn’t the deepest yet
news.description: Gold and silver have fallen sharply from their record highs in 2026, with gold down about 30% and silver by 54%. However, historical cycles show the current declines are not the deepest, and the time correction is still pending.
